label: Discrete spectrum near quartic continuum minimum accumulates as n^-4 with sharp exponent

provenance.source_span: Global m = 1 Stabilization of a Rotating Helical Z-pinch at Finite Pressure A. Kumar,1 J. C. Turner,2 A. Stepanov,2 T. Karminskaya,2 J. Flygare,2 J. Dadras,2 and C. Rea1 1 Plasma Science and Fusion Center, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Cambridge, MA 02139, USA 2

strengths: Makes a sharp spectral accumulation claim that can be tested numerically and analytically.
weaknesses: The n^-4 exponent may be sensitive to asymptotic assumptions, discretization, and how the continuum minimum is resolved.
